title: Spiderverse Shattered dimensions
description: A mod including all contents spider-man related
body:
IMPORTANT!! 
This mod is NO where near completion as around 85% of it still needs to be made. The mod includes 5 symbiotes, 10 suits, 5 web gadgets to choose from, a symbiote planet, and bondable symbiotes and spider powers all of which is achievable.

Introduction:
Dive into the Spiderverse and step into the shoes of Spider-Man or harness the power of iconic symbiotes like Venom, Carnage, Riot, and more. Discover a range of realistic suits with multiple styles and upgradeable stats. With over 40 unique suits, each offering various designs, and more than 20 symbiotes featuring their own special abilities and visual styles, the possibilities are endless. Explore a vibrant Spiderverse spanning over 10 different dimensions, and team up with companions like Peter B. Parker, Gwen Stacy, Miguel O'Hara, Peter Porker, and many others!
 

Key Features:
- Suits: A vast variety of high quality suits
- Symbiotes: Countless Symbiotes to chose from
- Powers: Hundreds of powers with different variations for each.
- Spiderverse: Multiple dimensions to explore and meet new companions or face new foes! 

Mod Highlights:
Some of our best aspects is our spider-verse with a vast variety of dimensions you can explore to either gain new spider power features such as invisibility, venom strike/punch, Hammer Space to store a multitude of items, our symbiote system allows you to get offspring's of symbiotes, or even become and gain the powers/ obtain gadgets of some of the most famous Spider-Man villains such as green goblin, the shocker, electro, the rhino, with many variants of them being obtainable if you dont like a certain look you can always obtain a different style, and many more.
 
Dependencies:
- GeckoLib:
- playerAnimator:
- Pehkui:
- Curois API:
- Remorphed:
 
Credits and Acknowledgments:
Special thanks to our team for their dedication and creativity in bringing "Spiderverse Shattered Dimensions" to life.
All credits go to all Spider-man related comics, games, and movies.

Credits:
GutinBr2 for Models and textures gutinbr2 on Discord.
FiveNights2161 for Coding and texturing .fivenights2161 on Discord.

Software used, Mcreator, IntelliJ.

Discord: Claude Network

 
 
We, the SSD Dev Team, reserve the right to deny access for the mods use on servers.
If you use our mod in your server, please do not charge money or any type of credit for selling any items from this mod without a Head Admin/owners approval.
